programs.title: A Plan to Kill
programs.desc: A botched bank robbery and bomb-clad hostage lead Erie detectives through a bizarre, convoluted scavenger hunt that starts with a pizza delivery, ends with multiple victims, and was concocted by a deranged perpetrator who has plans to kill again.

programs.title: Philly Homicide
programs.desc: After a talented artist and musician goes missing, the investigation into his disappearance leads to a gruesome discovery in a historic Philly cemetery, revealing a sinister series of events.

programs.title: Dateline
programs.desc: When a wife calls 911 to report her husband has been shot on a country road in Texas, officers rush to the scene.

programs.title: Dateline
programs.sub_title: Hinckley: Diary of a Dangerous Mind
programs.desc: Recently uncovered pages from John Hinckley Jr.'s diary, which he began writing after he was arrested for trying to assassinate President Ronald Reagan; an interview with the officer who questioned Hinckley after the attempted assassination.

programs.title: Dateline
programs.desc: A man uses a dating site to meet and murder a college student.

programs.title: Dateline: Unforgettable
programs.desc: For Keith Morrison, this case stands out as an unusual mystery; the crime seemed arbitrary with no apparent motive; there was a confession which might have ended the investigation but that was only the beginning.
